title: Requirements phase: PQ Private Transfer
description: Gather and clarify requirements for the PQ Private Transfer Protocol through structured Q&A before design begins.

title: Answer Q5: overdraft/underflow enforcement
description: Answer Q5 about mock-prover phase overdraft/underflow enforcement strategy

title: Synthesize final design document
description: Write consolidated requirements.md and design.md from Q&A. All 5 questions resolved. Design already complete in .agents/scratchpad/implementation/pq-private-transfer/design.md

title: Design review: pq-private-transfer
description: Adversarial design review of .agents/scratchpad/implementation/pq-private-transfer/design.md

title: Research: PQ Private Transfer
description: Explore codebase, find patterns, identify integration points for smart contract + crypto + frontend implementation

title: Create implementation plan for pq-private-transfer
description: Write TDD implementation plan to .agents/scratchpad/implementation/pq-private-transfer/plan.md

title: Step 1: packages/crypto — Package Setup + Types
description: Create packages/crypto package with package.json, tsconfig.json, and src/types.ts. Tests in src/types.test.ts. Types: Polynomial, Ciphertext, PublicKey, SecretKey, ZKProof.

title: Step 2: packages/crypto — Ring Regev Core
description: Implement ringRegev.ts: keygen, encrypt, decrypt, add, sub, homomorphicSum, serialize/deserialize. Tests in ringRegev.test.ts.

title: Step 3: packages/crypto — Mock STARK Circuits
description: Implement mock STARK circuits: depositCircuit.ts, transferCircuit.ts, withdrawCircuit.ts. Tests for prove/verify roundtrip and rejection of malformed proofs.

title: Step 4: RingRegev.sol + Tests
description: Implement RingRegev Solidity library (add/sub mod q). Tests in RingRegev.test.ts.

title: Step 5: Verifier Contracts + Tests
description: Implement DepositVerifier.sol, TransferVerifier.sol, WithdrawVerifier.sol. Tests in Verifiers.test.ts.

title: Step 6: PrivateTransfer.sol + Deploy
description: Implement PrivateTransfer.sol, ignition module, update deploy script. Tests in PrivateTransfer.test.ts.

title: Step 7: Frontend — Register Page
description: Implement register page, BalanceDisplay, ProofStatus, Web Worker.

title: Step 8: Frontend — Transfer Page
description: Implement transfer page and DummyPoolStatus component.

title: Step 9: Frontend — Withdraw Page
description: Implement withdraw page.

title: PrivateTransfer: add pool-size, duplicate-recipient, and nullifier checks
description:
Add missing security features to PrivateTransfer.sol:
1. totalRegistered counter (increment in register)
2. Pool size check in transfer: totalRegistered >= N+1 (need at least 5 for N=4)
3. Duplicate recipient check in transfer (no address appears twice)
4. Self-recipient check: msg.sender not in recipients
5. usedTransfers nullifier mapping to prevent double-spend
7. Add custom errors: InsufficientPool, InvalidRecipients, TransferAlreadyUsed, ETHTransferFailed
8. Tests for all new checks (TDD: write tests first)

title: Validation: PQ Private Transfer
description: Final validation gate: run all tests, build, lint, E2E scenarios, YAGNI/KISS checks

title: Commit: PQ Private Transfer implementation
description: Create git commit after validation.passed

title: Fix unused encAmount parameter in withdraw()
description: PrivateTransfer.sol line ~104: change 'bytes calldata encAmount,' to 'bytes calldata /* encAmount */,' to silence unused parameter warning. Then re-run compile + tests to confirm 40/40 pass and no warnings.

title: pq:validation
description: Final validation gate

title: Commit validation fixes
description: Commit YAGNI fix (remove unused keyStorage exports) and updated validation.md
